description: Comprehensive bloatware list for Motorola devices — Motoblur (Android 2-4), My UX, Stock Android variants

packages.name: Moto Actions
packages.description: Gestures: chop for flashlight, twist for camera, etc.

packages.name: Moto Voice
packages.description: Motorola voice assistant. Substitute: Google Assistant.

packages.name: Carrier IQ Agent
packages.description: Carrier usage data collection. Recommended to remove.

packages.name: Moto Launcher
packages.description: Motorola default launcher. Substitute: Nova Launcher.

packages.name: Facebook App Manager
packages.description: Facebook background service. Recommended to remove.

packages.name: First Screen / Mobile Posse
packages.description: Lock screen ads. Remove with priority.

packages.name: Moto Style (legacy)
packages.description: Theme and wallpaper app from older Moto devices.

packages.name: Motoblur Setup Wizard (legacy)
packages.description: Old setup wizard from Motoblur era (Android 2-4).

packages.name: Moto Widget (legacy)
packages.description: Old home screen widget from Motoblur.

packages.name: Live Motion (legacy)
packages.description: Animated wallpaper from older Moto UI.

packages.name: Motoblur Contacts Provider (legacy)
packages.description: Social contacts sync from Motoblur era.

packages.name: Sprint Tools (carrier)
packages.description: Sprint/T-Mobile carrier tools pre-installed on some Moto models.

packages.name: Verizon IQ Agent (carrier)
packages.description: Verizon usage tracking on carrier Moto models.

packages.name: Motorola Core Framework
packages.description: Core Motorola framework. Removal may break Moto features.

packages.name: Motorola Audio Monitor
packages.description: Audio service. Removal may affect calls.
